name: blockrun-ai
description: blockrun.ai is a prediction market data host focused on Polymarket and Kalshi. It serves agents that need to analyze trader performance, browse available markets, inspect market price history, or compare cohort-level statistics. Its primary strength is wallet analytics across multiple time windows (1d/7d/30d/all-time) and cross-market coverage spanning both Polymarket and Kalshi. It does not support order placement, live order book depth, or non-prediction-market on-chain data.
